summary: v104.44.33 Testing Complete - GLOBAL HARD BLOCK including VW VERIFIED. All features working correctly: (1) VW is now a HARD BLOCKER (not filtered out), (2) Edit-if-unchanged skip logic prevents false-positive blocks on legitimate edits, (3) RST duplicate check returns ALL entries including VW.
critical_code_review_comments: Added data-testid='bp-edit-{voucher_no}' to ByProductSaleRegister.jsx edit button for better test automation

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All RST duplicate scenarios verified via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (RST 7 has 2 bp_sale_register + 1 vehicle_weights entries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: v104.44.33 GLOBAL HARD BLOCK verified. Key changes: (1) useRstCheck.jsx hasBlocker = same.length + other.length > 0 (VW no longer exempt). (2) All forms (VehicleWeight, ByProductSaleRegister, SaleBook, PurchaseVouchers, PaddyPurchase, App.js Mill Entry) have 'originalRst' state tracking for edit-if-unchanged skip logic. (3) RST 7 check returns 3 entries: 2 bp_sale_register + 1 VW Dispatch(Sale). (4) Edit S-002 (RST 7) without changing RST succeeds. (5) Edit S-003 with RST change to 7 is BLOCKED.

backend_rst_check_api.details: GET /api/rst-check?rst_no=7&context=sale returns ALL 3 entries (2 bp_sale_register + 1 vehicle_weights). VW is NOT filtered out.

backend_exclude_id_for_vw.details: exclude_id parameter correctly excludes VW entry when editing.

backend_cross_type_check.details: RST 7 (sale) checked in purchase context returns entries in exists_other.

frontend_new_bp_sale_hard_block.details: New Rice Bran Sale with RST 7 shows warning (3 duplicates including VW) and blocks save with error toast.

frontend_edit_unchanged_rst_succeeds.details: Edit S-002 (RST 7) without changing RST succeeds - no false-positive block. Toast shows 'Updated!'

frontend_edit_changed_rst_blocks.details: Edit S-003 with RST change to 7 shows warning and blocks save with error toast.

vw_included_in_blockers.details: Vehicle Weight (Dispatch(Sale)) appears in RST warning message, confirming VW is now a HARD BLOCKER.

regression_v104_44_31.details: All 12 tests pass (RST check, Transit Pass Register, Next RST/TP endpoints).

regression_v104_44_32.details: All 8 tests pass (bp_sale_register collection name fix, mill_entries collection).

test_classes: TestRstCheckV104_44_33_Backend (4 tests) - API returns all entries including VW
TestRstCheckV104_44_33_HasBlockerLogic (2 tests) - VW no longer exempt from blockers
TestRstCheckV104_44_33_Regression (3 tests) - v104.44.32 fixes still work

user_demand_verification.original_demand: rst number kabhi pai b duplicate nahi hona chahiye entire software mai
user_demand_verification.implementation: v104.44.33 makes VW a HARD BLOCKER. Previously VW was filtered out as 'natural source'. Now any RST that exists in VW will also block new entries.
user_demand_verification.edge_case_handled: Edit-if-unchanged skip logic prevents false-positive blocks when editing existing entries without changing RST (e.g., editing S-002 remark while RST 7 stays same).
